name: Vehicle Combat and Hazards
summary: Fahrzeugkampf ist hochletal und kombiniert Waffen-, Unfall- und Bot-Persoenlichkeitslogik.

mechanics.vehicle_damage: Use dedicated vehicle damage outcomes; crashes can cascade to occupants.
mechanics.bot_brain_rule: Vehicle AI may obey mission wording while undermining passenger comfort.
mechanics.design_principle: Every vehicle should include at least one dangerous flaw.
